meta.tagline: The witch in you is still asleep.
meta.descLanding: An examination for the witch factor, addressed to you. The instrument reads your answers, the court pronounces its verdict — and the archive already holds the page for the witch you became on the island.
meta.descExam: The examination is underway. The instrument is reading your answers.
meta.descCard: A page from the witch codex — {epithet}. Your witch factor has been detected.
meta.descShare: A page from the witch codex — {epithet}. Sit the examination yourself, and see which witch it reads in you.

landing.caseLine: Sacred Calendar, Year ── · Notice of Examination
landing.title: Witch Factor Examination
landing.hook: The witch in you is still asleep.
landing.ctaAside: The examination adapts to you — expect roughly fifteen to thirty questions.

whatIs.label: What this is
whatIs.title: What this is
whatIs.body: A fictional examination. It does not diagnose you and it does not judge you — it traces one thing only: were you sent to the island too, which witch would you grow into.

duration.label: How long
duration.title: How long it takes
duration.body: The length differs from person to person; it unfolds with your answers. Usually between fifteen and thirty questions — it never promises a fixed count in advance.

specimen.label: A specimen record
specimen.title: A page of the codex
specimen.body: Every detection is transcribed into a page — epithet, magic, crime, execution, and a single line of epitaph. Below is a specimen.

footer.disclaimer: This site is a non-commercial fan work based on 魔法少女ノ魔女裁判 (Magical Girl · Witch Trial), unaffiliated with the original and its rights holders.

gate.title: Consent to Examination
gate.fan: This examination is a non-commercial fan project based on 魔法少女ノ魔女裁判, unaffiliated with the original work and its rights holders.
gate.age: Intended for ages 18 and over. The content touches dark themes — execution, and harm and self-punishment adjacent to self-injury.
gate.content: If you are in a fragile place right now, go gently — you can stop at any time.
gate.crisisIntro: If you are struggling with thoughts of hurting yourself, please reach a crisis line near you first:
gate.storage: Your answers are kept only in this browser, on this device. Nothing is uploaded or collected.

namePrompt.title: The name to carve into the record

verdict.sentence: The verdict stands — you are taken to the island.

share.heading: Keep this record
share.template: {name} — {epithet}. My witch factor has been detected.

feedback.softArchival: This archive is still being transcribed.
feedback.invite: What rang true, and what missed? Tell us about the resonance.
feedback.mailBody: (What felt like you, and what didn't — the resonance.)

result.safety: This page carries dark themes. If it struck close to something, take care of yourself first.

errors.archive: The archive did not answer. Try again.

shareCta.title: Sit the examination yourself
shareCta.body: The same examination is waiting for you. See which witch the instrument reads in you.

notFound.title: This page is not in the archive.
notFound.body: The record you were looking for is not filed here.
